visual_analysis.description: Green soda can with 'Sprite' branding, located in the front and directly obstructing the primary target.
Brown coffee bottle located in the front-left, obstructing the white can.
White soda can with 'Milkis' branding, located behind the brown bottle and also obstructing the primary target.
Red soda can, presumed to be Coca-Cola, partially visible behind the green and white cans.

action_plan.explanation: Removing the green soda can as it is the most direct obstacle in front of the target red soda can.
Removing the front-most brown bottle to clear access to the white can behind it.
Removing the white can which is the final obstacle blocking the red soda can.
Picking the user-requested red soda can (coca-cola) now that all obstructions have been cleared.
